title: Fraaisig educator shines in Life Orientation
description: KNYSNA NEWS - In recognition of his...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - In recognition of his exceptional contribution to shaping young minds, Nathan McKock, a dedicated Life Orientation educator at Fraaisig Primary School, has been honored with a prestigious Certificate of Excellence.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - In recognition of his exceptional contribution to shaping young minds, Nathan McKock, a dedicated Life Orientation educator at Fraaisig Primary School, has been honored with a prestigious Certificate of Excellence."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"His passion for teaching and commitment to nurturing students' personal growth has earned him this well-deserved accolade."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read more in this week's Knysna-Plett Herald.","html":"Read more in this week's Knysna-Plett Herald."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Fraaisig educator shines in Life Orientation
